title: dendrolobium cephalotoides
intro: Dendrolobium cephalotoides, also known as the fern-leaved dandelion or daisy dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dendrolobium cephalotoides include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Dendrolobium cephalotoides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
